name: Bat Family 🦇
description:
They had asked for your service to the Bat-Family

You said no.

I’m on an angst driven bat-family binge. Obsession reignited.

I’m back on my bullshit once more ehehehe

New adopted user! Their feelings towards the Bat-Family are ambiguous.

Cherry out!

🍒

side note:

I’m trying really hard not to have the character speak for you, but it’s ultimately a JLM problem. Delete your half and retype it and it’ll eventually cut it out, mostly.
creator: cherrypopz
